name: Cappuccino Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces White chocolate, cut into small pieces
1 1/2 cups Heavy cream, whipped until stiff
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. For the crust, in a large bowl combine crumbs, macadamia nuts, sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix well.
3. Add melted butter and mix well to moisten the nut mixture. Press into a well-greased 12-inch flan or tart pan with a removable bottom. Chill for 30 minutes.
4. For the filling, place milk, sugar, and flour in a heavy-bottomed saucepan. Mix well so there are no lumps.
5. Add chocolate, espresso powder, and vanilla. Cook, stirring over medium heat until thick enough to coat the back of a spoon.
6. In a small bowl, whisk egg yolks with enough milk mixture to warm them to the temperature of the milk.
7. Pour yolk mixture into the saucepan and cook, stirring, until very thick.
8. Pour filling into prepared crust and refrigerate for at least 2 to 3 hours.
9. Just before serving, top with whipped cream and garnish with chocolate-covered espresso beans.
10. Serve chilled.
